effect_zh: 现在e能吃到属性碎片的加成不知道是不是bug / 拿质变海克斯锻体攻速
description_en: Gain one random Prismatic augment, excluding the other two offerings in your current assortment.

effect_zh: 急速之追求是海克斯大乱斗当前 26.12 版本中的gold稀有度强化符文，胜率 64.41% 、登场率 70.14% ，排名 #1。
description_en: YourEnemy Missing pings will cause you to launch a missile at the pinged location, exploding upon arrival to deal 100 to 400 (+ 10% of target's missing health) magic damage to enemies struck, and heal allied champions within for 50 to 200 (+ 10% of target's missing health).

effect_zh: 掷骰狂人是海克斯大乱斗当前 26.12 版本中的prismatic稀有度强化符文，胜率 63.62% 、登场率 51.72% ，排名 #6。
description_en: YourEnemy Missing pings will cause you to launch a missile at the pinged location, exploding upon arrival to deal 100 to 400 (+ 10% of target's missing health) magic damage to enemies struck, and heal allied champions within for 50 to 200 (+ 10% of target's missing health).

effect_zh: 蛋白粉可以提供高额的恢复能力，利用大树被动的高额百分比回血，一直赖着不死。
description_en: Scoring a champion takedown generates a stack, stacking infinitely. For each stack, increase your maximum health and size by 5%. Lose 65% of stacks on death.

effect_zh: 威能之追求是海克斯大乱斗当前 26.12 版本中的silver稀有度强化符文，胜率 61.45% 、登场率 67.29% ，排名 #3。
description_en: YourEnemy Missing pings will cause you to launch a missile at the pinged location, exploding upon arrival to deal 100 to 400 (+ 10% of target's missing health) magic damage to enemies struck, and heal allied champions within for 50 to 200 (+ 10% of target's missing health).
